methodology.definition: Impact combines shipping volume, substantial merged work, and review support over the last 90 days.
methodology.meaningfulPrDefinition: A merged PR is meaningful when it hits at least 2 of 3 depth signals: 5+ changed files, 2+ top-level areas, or 2+ reviews.
notes: Scores use min-max normalization across engineers for merged PRs, meaningful merged PRs, and reviews given.
Raw stats are shown directly for explainability and are not normalized in the UI.
Merge rate is based on pull requests closed in the last 90 days, with merged pull requests as the numerator.
Review counts include APPROVED and CHANGES_REQUESTED states and exclude self-reviews.
